videos.description:
This is my first hot take on the new Samsung Galaxy Book6 Pro. With it’s premium aluminum unibody design, one of the best 3K AMOLED displays on a laptop and the new updated Series 3 Intel chips makes this one of the best laptops to get for 2026. It also features great all day battery life and paired with other Samsung Galaxy Devices + AI features making it even more powerful to use.

videos.title: NVIDIA RTX Spark - First LOOK and Hands ON!
videos.description:
First look at the NEW NVIDIA RTX Spark Chip ⚡️

- This next gen chip features a Grace CPU and Blackwell GPU
- 1 Petaflop of AI Compute Performance
- 128GB of Unified Memory 

It's running here on the new ASUS Pro Art 16, one of the newest laptops to feature it and is considerably thinner than last year.
